zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Thomasine Lambe於1534年出生在英國越可爾利德斯時，她的父親Robert Adhelm Lambe of Leeds26歲，母親Martha Emily Castell22歲。她於大約1546年與Sir William Brastice of ireland在愛爾蘭庫迪 洛斯可蒙結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1596年在愛爾蘭庫迪 維斯特亞斯阿隆享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Thomasine Lambe于1534年出生在英国越可爾利德斯时，她的父亲Robert Adhelm Lambe of Leeds26岁，母亲Martha Emily Castell22岁。她于大约1546年与Sir William Brastice of ireland在爱尔兰庫迪 洛斯可蒙结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1596年在爱尔兰庫迪 維斯特亞斯阿隆享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lambe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Ciaran, Ethna.

variants.name: Lamb
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Lamb, a pet form of Lambert .
English: nickname for a meek and inoffensive person, from Middle English lamb, or a metonymic occupational name for a keeper of lambs. See also Lamm .

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Luain ‘descendant of the warrior’, formerly Anglicized as O'Loan (see Lane 3). MacLysaght comments: "The form Lamb(e), which results from a more than usually absurd pseudo-translation (uan ‘lamb’), is now much more numerous than O'Loan itself.".

nameMeanings.name: Thomasine
meanings: Hebrew: A twin; Thomasine is a female version.

historicEvents.description: Henry VIII dies, succeeded by the boy king Edward VI. England and Ireland were ruled by the senior nobility of England.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Thomasine Lambe was born in 1534, in Leeds, Yorkshire, England, her father, Robert Adhelm Lambe of Leeds, was 26 and her mother, Martha Emily Castell, was 22. She married Sir William Brastice of ireland about 1546, in County Roscommon, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1596, in Athlone, County Westmeath, Ireland, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Thomasine Lambe est née en 1534, à Leeds, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Robert Adhelm Lambe of Leeds, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Martha Emily Castell, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Brastice of ireland environ 1546, à County Roscommon, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1596, à Athlone, County Westmeath, Irlande, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Thomasine Lambe 1534 in Leeds, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Adhelm Lambe of Leeds 26 und ihre Mutter Martha Emily Castell 22. Sie hat um 1546 in County Roscommon, Irland Sir William Brastice of ireland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1596 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Athlone, County Westmeath, Irland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Thomasine Lambe è nata il nel 1534 nel Leeds, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Robert Adhelm Lambe of Leeds, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Martha Emily Castell, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Brastice of ireland circa 1546, nel County Roscommon, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1596, nel Athlone, County Westmeath, Irlanda, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Thomasine Lambeが1534年にイギリスヨークシュアイアリーズで生まれた時，父Robert Adhelm Lambe of Leedsは26歳，母Martha Emily Castellは22歳であった。約1546年にアイルランドコウントイ ロスコンモンでSir William Brastice of irelandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1596年にアイルランドコウントイ ウエストメアスアスロンで62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Thomasine Lambe(이)가 1534년 영국 요르크실르 리드즈에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Adhelm Lambe of Leeds(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Martha Emily Castell(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 대략 1546년 아일랜드 카운티 로스코몬에서 Sir William Brastice of ireland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1596년 아일랜드 카운티 웨스트미스 앳h론에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Thomasine Lambe nasceu em 1534, em Leeds, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Adhelm Lambe of Leeds, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Martha Emily Castell, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Brastice of ireland aproximadamente 1546, em County Roscommon, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1596, em Athlone, County Westmeath, Irlanda, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Thomasine Lambe родилась в 1534 г. в местности лидс, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert Adhelm Lambe of Leeds было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Martha Emily Castell, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Brastice of ireland около 1546 г. в местности коунти роскоммон, Ирландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1596 г. в местности атлоун, коунти вестмит, Ирландия в возрасте 62 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Thomasine Lambe nació en 1534, en Leeds, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Adhelm Lambe of Leeds, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Martha Emily Castell, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Sir William Brastice of ireland aproximadamente 1546, en County Roscommon, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1596, en Athlone, County Westmeath, Irlanda, a la edad de 62 años.
